content: Merged Frank's #604 undo hardening after branch and clean-main verification. I also declined the stale duplicate baseline PRs (#595 and #603) by comment; remaining open PRs are not needed for final.

Opened PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/604 for the hardening area you called out. It adds targeted tests for single-cell undo/redo and 50-action undo depth, fixes the UI row/col edit history path, and keeps Delete range clear as one action.
